description: Text-only graphic on a plain white background, formatted as an article header. A large bold black serif headline reads: 'Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa'. Below, in a lighter sans-serif subheadline: 'The Labor Department said it would start opening investigations into companies that take advantage of the H-1B visa program.' A grey line at the bottom reads: 'Updated September 23, 2025 at 6:07 p.m. EDT'. No photographs or seals appear in the crop.
notable_text: Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa; The Labor Department said it would start opening investigations into companies that take advantage of the H-1B visa program. Updated September 23, 2025 at 6:07 p.m. EDT
